summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently against the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive refs were present, no shared canonical was invented, and no close/comment/label mutation is planned because instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled and each PR is either focused useful work, maintainer-owned draft work, or blocked by proof/review gates.

actions.reason: Focused contributor fix should remain open for maintainer review; this inventory shard is not allowed to merge or raise fixes.
Maintainer-owned draft/broad QA work is independent of this inventory cleanup lane and should not be closed or mutated by Clownfish.
Focused contributor fix should stay open on its linked bug lane; proof and maintainer review remain the live gates.
Focused docs/tooling PR should remain open, but unresolved bot comments and failing proof/checks block any stronger fixed-by-candidate or closeout classification.
Focused CI coverage PR should remain open on its linked issue lane; unresolved review-bot findings and proof failure block closure or merge-path claims.
